text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Today's the JBC Classic. And the question on
everyone's lips is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Have the three of us become equally matched?
What do you think, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: I think you definitely have! So, do your best!
I think you definitely have! So, do your best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before, all Copano Rickey could do was chase
after both Hokko Tarumae and Wonder Acute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now things are different. This will be a test of
her growth. And as for the other two...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've been training nonstop to make up for
the time I missed!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I think, this time, I'll finally be able to show you
the real me!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling bright-eyed and bushy-tailed. You two
have given me more motivation than I could ask
for.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show you both today how Wonder
Acute wins a race.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Both Tarumae and Acute are in perfect form.
And since I am too...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(...the Four Guardians might finally be in balance.
The ideal equilibrium.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Today's race will be the test. We'll see if we've
brought our best selves.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Aaaall right! Tarumae, Acute, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's give it everything we've got and make this
the greatest, happiest race ever! ☆
